title: Beta Patch Notes - v0.100.0
author: demileaf
contents:
Welcome to the first BIG post-launch patch, Slayers!! This one has a huge balance pass, the main aim of which is to make infinites harder to achieve. We're also introducing a Phobia Mode with bespoke assets that should mitigate various creepy phobia concerns. Speaking of visuals, here are some other major highlights:

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44971832/ef2c49f649628f6b0c3e7f916b71b8fa04927e64.png[/img]
Some snazzy new portrait art for various cards!

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/44971832/7502cc061e31a7835a62edc298a11acd9d1b8d81.gif[/img]

Cool new character-specific VFX for when you gain energy!

Reminder that [b]this patch is exclusive to the beta branch branch for now[/b], which you can access via the instructions outlined [url=https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/2868840/view/502852451136700758?]here[/url]. It will come to the main branch later, likely with some more tweaks!

[h3]CONTENT:[/h3]

[b]General:[/b]
[list]
[*]Added a [b]Deprecated Card[/b] placeholder: Status - "Draw 1 card. Remove this from your Deck. Exhaust."
[list]
[*]If you have an in-progress run and a card in your deck is removed from the game due to a recent update, it will be replaced with "Deprecated Card"
[/list]
[/list]
[b]Ironclad:[/b]
[list]
[*]Reworked [b]Dominate[/b] card: Skill - Cost 1 - Uncommon - "Apply 1(2) Vulnerable. Gain 1 Strength for each Vulnerable on the enemy. Exhaust."
[*]Reworked [b]Expect a Fight[/b] card: Skill - Cost 2(1) - Uncommon - "Gain [E] for each Attack in your Hand. You cannot gain additional [E] this turn."
[*]Reworked [b]Spite[/b] card: Cost 0 - Attack - Uncommon - "Deal 5 damage. If you lost HP this turn, hits 2(3) times."
[*]Reworked [b]Stoke[/b] card: Skill - Cost 1 - Rare - "Exhaust your Hand. Add 1 random (Upgraded) card into your Hand for each card Exhausted."
[/list]
[b]Silent:[/b]
[list]
[*]Reworked [b]Prepared[/b] card into [b]Prepare[/b]: Skill - Cost 1 - Common - "Discard 2 cards. Next turn, gain 2(3) Energy."
[/list]
[b]Regent:[/b]
[list]
[*]Reworked Glow card: Skill - Cost 1 - Common - "Gain 1(2) Stars. Draw 1 card. Next turn, draw 1 card."
[/list]
[b]Colorless Cards:[/b]
[list]
[*]Reworked [b]Hidden Gem[/b] card: Skill - Cost 1 - "A random card in your Draw Pile without Replay gains Replay 2(3)."
[/list]
[b]Enemies:[/b]
[list]
[*]Reworked [b]Doormaker[/b]. [i]Beware.[/i]
[*]Reworked [b]Skulking Colony[/b] to have a deadlier moveset
[/list]
[b]Ancients:[/b]
[list]
[*]Added new [b]Neow[/b] blessing: [b]Hefty Tablet[/b] -"Choose 1 of 3 Rare cards to add to your Deck. Add 1 Injury to your Deck."
[*]Added new [b]Neow[/b] blessing: [b]Neow's Talisman[/b] - "Upgrade 1 of your Strikes and 1 of your Defends."
[/list]

[h3]BALANCE:[/h3]

[b]General:[/b]
[list]
[*]All relics in the shop now cost 25 Gold less
[*]Relics that generate Gold (such as Bowler Hat and Amethyst Aubergine) no longer appear at the Merchant
[*]Gloom Ascension now also affects ? rooms
[*]Power values can no longer stack above 999,999,999
[*]You can no longer acquire epochs in Daily or Custom runs
[*]Certain character stats no longer update in Daily or Custom runs
[/list]
[b]Ironclad:[/b]
[list]
[*]Buffed [b]Break[/b] card:
[list]
[*]Energy cost decreased from 2 -> 1
[*]Damage increased from 20(25) -> 20(30)
[/list]
[*]Buffed [b]Cinder[/b] card: Damage increased from 17(22) -> 18(24)
[*]Buffed [b]Fight Me![/b] card: self-Strength gain from 2(3) -> 3(4)
[*]Nerfed [b]Forgotten Ritual[/b] card: now Exhausts
[*]Buffed [b]Hemokinesis[/b] card: Damage increased from 14(19) -> 15(20)
[*]Buffed [b]Tremble[/b] card: Vulnerable increased from 2(3) -> 3(4)
[/list]
[b]Silent:[/b]
[list]
[*]Nerfed [b]Anticipate[/b] card: Dexterity decreased from 3(5) -> 2(3)
[*]Nerfed [b]Corrosive Wave[/b] card: Poison decreased from 3(4) -> 2(3)
[*]Nerfed [b]Flick-Flack[/b] card: Damage decreased from 7(9) -> 6(8)
[*]Buffed [b]Grand Finale[/b] card: Damage increased from 50(60) -> 60(75)
[*]Nerfed [b]Pinpoint[/b]: Damage decreased from 17(22) -> 15(19)
[*]Buffed [b]Skewer[/b] card: Damage increased from 7(10) -> 8(11)
[*]Nerfed [b]Untouchable[/b] card: Block gain decreased from 9(12) -> 7(9)
[/list]
[b]Regent:[/b]
[list]
[*]Nerfed Alignment card: Star cost increased from 2 -> 3
[*]Changed [b]BEGONE![/b] card:
[list]
[*]Now a Skill that no longer deals damage
[*]Now creates Minion Strike instead of Minion Dive Bomb
[/list]
[*]Buffed [b]Bundle of Joy[/b] card: Energy cost lowered from 2 -> 1
[*]Changed [b]CHARGE!![/b] card: now creates [b]Minion Dive Bomb[/b] cards instead of [b]Minion Strike[/b] cards
[*]Buffed [b]Collision Course[/b] card: Damage increased from 9(12) -> 11(15)
[*]Buffed [b]Gather Light[/b] card: Block increased from 7(10) -> 8(11)
[*]Buffed [b]Heirloom Hammer[/b] card: Damage increased from 17(22) -> 20(25)
[*]Buffed [b]I Am Invincible[/b] card: Block increased from 9(12) -> 10(13)
[*]Buffed [b]Kingly Kick[/b] card: Damage increased from 24(30) -> 27(35)
[*]Buffed [b]Kingly Punch[/b] card:
[list]
[*]Base damage increased from 8(8) -> 8(10)
[*]Scaling damage increased from 3(5) -> 4(6)
[/list]
[*]Buffed [b]Minion Dive Bomb[/b] card: Energy cost decreased from 1 -> 0
[*]Nerfed [b]Minion Strike[/b] card: Damage decreased from 7(10) -> 6(9)
[*]Buffed [b]Parry[/b] card: Block increased from 6(9) -> 8(11)
[*]Buffed [b]Patter[/b] card: Block increased from 8(10) -> 9(11)
[*]Buffed [b]Solar Strike[/b] card: damage increased from 8(9) -> 9(10)
[*]Buffed [b]Spoils of Battle[/b] card: Forge increased from 10(15) -> 12(17)
[*]Nerfed [b]Void Form[/b] card:
[list]
[*]Is now Ethereal
[*]Upgrade changed from +1 card -> losing Ethereal
[/list]
[*]Buffed [b]Wrought in War[/b] card: Forge increased from 5(7) -> 7(9)
[/list]
[b]Necrobinder:[/b]
[list]
[*]Nerfed [b]Banshee's Cry[/b] card:
[list]
[*]Cost increased from 6 -> 9(7)
[*]Upgrade no longer increases damage
[/list]
[*]Nerfed [b]Borrowed Time[/b] card:
[list]
[*]Self-Doom increased from 3(3) -> 6(3)
[*]Energy gain no longer increases on Upgrade
[/list]
[*]Nerfed [b]Capture Spirit[/b] card:
[list]
[*]HP loss decreased from 3(4) -> 2(3)
[*]Souls generated decreased from 3(4) -> 2(3)
[/list]
[*]Buffed [b]Danse Macabre[/b] card: Block increased from 3(4) -> 4(6)
[*]Buffed [b]Debilitate[/b] card: Damage increased from 7(9) -> 10(12)
[*]Changed [b]Defy[/b] card: upgrade no longer increases Weak, but increases Block by +3 instead of +1
[*]Nerfed [b]Dirge[/b] card: now Exhausts
[*]Changed [b]Grave Warden[/b] card: upgrade changed from 8(10) Block -> 8(11) Block and no longer upgrades the Soul
[*]Buffed [b]Sculpting Strike[/b] card: Damage increased from 8(11) -> 9(12)
[*]Nerfed [b]Seance[/b] card:
[list]
[*]Cost increased from 0 -> 1(0)
[*]Upgrade no longer makes a Soul+
[/list]
[/list]
[b]Defect:[/b]
[list]
[*]Nerfed [b]Hotfix[/b] card:
[list]
[*]Now has Exhaust
[*]Upgrade now removes Exhaust instead of increasing Focus
[/list]
[*]Buffed [b]Rocket Punch[/b] card: cost reduction effect now lasts until it is played, instead of just until the end of the turn
[/list]
[b]Colorless Cards:[/b]
[list]
[*]Buffed [b]Seeker Strike[/b] card: Damage increased from 6(9) -> 9(12)
[*]Changed [b]Discovery[/b] card: "It costs 0 [E] this turn." -> "It's free to play this turn."
[list]
[*]This means that, if the card it generates has a Star cost, this cost is now also reduced to 0 this turn
[/list]
[*]Buffed [b]Eternal Armor[/b] card: Plating increased from 7(9) -> 9(12)
[*]Changed [b]Hidden Gem[/b] card: can no longer be generated in combat by effects like Skill Potion
[*]Changed [b]Production[/b] card: upgrade changed from losing Exhaust -> +1 additional Energy
[/list]
[b]Potions & Relics:[/b]
[list]
[*]Buffed [b]Amethyst Aubergine[/b] relic: Gold gain increased from 10 -> 15
[*]Buffed [b]Book of Five Rings[/b] relic: healing increased from 15 -> 20
[*]Buffed [b]Bowler Hat[/b] relic: Gold gain increased from 20% -> 25%
[*]Buffed [b]Permafrost[/b] relic: Block gain increased from 6 -> 7
[*]Buffed [b]Planisphere[/b] relic: HP gain increased from 4 -> 5
[*]Buffed [b]Stone Cracker[/b] relic: now works in ALL combats but only upgrades 2 cards
[/list]
[b]Enemies:[/b]
[list]
[*]Nerfed [b]Bygone Effigy[/b]: Damage decreased from 15(17) -> 13(15) (still attacks with 10 Strength)
[*]Buffed [b]Byrdonis[/b]: Swoop attack damage increased from 16(18) -> 17(19)
[*]Changed [b]Calcified Cultist + Toadpole[/b] encounter: now [b]Calcified Cultist + Seapunk[/b]
[*]Buffed [b]Rocket Claw[/b]: 
[list]
[*]Charge Up move Strength gain now scales with Ascension from 2(2) -> 2(3)
[*]HP increased from 189(199) -> 199(209)
[*]Rage power Strength buffed from 5 -> 6
[/list]
[*]Buffed [b]Crusher Claw[/b]:
[list]
[*]Adapt move Strength gain now scales with Ascension from 2(2) -> 2(3)
[*]HP increased from 199(209) -> 209(219)
[*]Rage power Strength buffed from 5 -> 6
[/list]
[*]Nerfed [b]Decimillipede[/b]: HP decreased from 42(48)-48(56) to 40(46) - 46(52)
[*]Nerfed [b]Fabricator[/b]: HP value of all bots decreased by 5
[*]Changed the [b]Tunneler[/b] normal encounter: the [b]Bowlbug[/b] is now replaced by a [b]Chomper[/b] that gives Dazed status cards on turn 1
[*]Nerfed [b]Living Fog[/b] encounter: [b]Gas Bomb[/b] HP decreased from 10(12) -> 7(8)
[*]Buffed [b]The Lost and The Forgotten[/b] encounter:
[list]
[*]Stat stealing now scales with Ascension; increased from 2 -> 3 of their respective stat at A9
[*][b]The Forgotten[/b] now deals an additional point of damage for every Dexterity it has
[/list]
[*]Changed [b]Nibbit[/b]: now properly scales with Ascension
[list]
[*]Hiss move now scales from 2 -> 3 Strength on A9
[*]Slice move damage now scales from 6 -> 7 on A9
[*]Slice move Block now scales from 5 -> 6 on A8
[/list]
[*]Nerfed [b]Phantasmal Gardeners[/b]: HP decreased from 28(29)-32(33) -> 26(27)-31(32)
[*]Buffed [b]Seapunk[/b]: Sea Kick move damage increased from 11(12) -> 11(13)
[*]Nerfed [b]Terror Eel[/b]:
[list]
[*]Crash damage now scales from 17(19) -> 16(18)
[*]Thrash Vigor now scales from 7 -> 6
[/list]
[*]Changed [b]Test Subject[/b]: Phase 2 no longer has the Pounce move, instead will repeat Multi Claw move every turn
[/list]
[b]Ancients:[/b]
[list]
[*]Buffed [b]Neow's Fury[/b] card: the number of cards returned to your hand now upgrades from 2 -> 3
[*]Nerfed [b]Neow's Leafy Poultice[/b] relic: blessing's max HP loss increased from 10 -> 12
[*]Nerfed [b]Neow's Precarious Shears[/b] relic: blessing's self-damage increased from 13 -> 16
[*]Changed [b]Tanx's Tri-Boomerang[/b] relic: Instinct enchantment no longer reduces cost, instead doubles damage on enchanted Attacks
[*]Changed [b]Vakuu's Preserved Fog[/b] relic:
[list]
[*]Cards removed decreased from 5 -> 3
[*]Folly curse is now Ethereal
[/list]
[/list]
[b]Events:[/b]
[list]
[*]Changed [b]Dense Vegetation[/b] event: Trudge On option is now "Lose 8 HP. Gain 61-99 Gold."
[*]Changed [b]Endless Conveyor[/b] event:
[list]
[*]Can no longer spawn unless all players have at least 120 Gold (up from 105)
[*]"Grab off the Belt" option cost increased from 35 -> 40 Gold
[/list]
[*]Changed [b]Grave of the Forgotten[/b] event: can no longer spawn unless every player has a card with Exhaust in their deck
[*]Changed [b]Morphic Grove[/b] event:
[list]
[*]Can no longer spawn unless all players have at least 2 transformable cards in their decks
[*]Group option now costs ALL of the player's gold
[*]In multiplayer, is now a collaborative event
[/list]
[*]Changed [b]Spirit Grafter[/b] event: Rejection option is now "Lose 10 HP. Upgrade a card."
[*]Changed [b]The Round Tea Party[/b] event: can no longer spawn unless all players have at least 12 HP
[/list]
[b]Multiplayer:[/b]
[list]
[*]Nerfed [b]Beacon of Hope[/b] card: can no longer be stacked
[*]Nerfed [b]Believe in You[/b] card: Energy decreased from 3(4)-> 2(3)
[*]Nerfed [b]Huddle Up[/b] card: now Exhausts
[/list]

[h3]ART:[/h3]
[list]
[*]Infection affliction card overlay is no longer animated when Phobia Mode is turned on
[*]Added alternate Phobia Mode visuals for:
[list]
[*]Hive backgrounds
[*]The Insatiable
[*]Phrog Parasite
[*]Wrigglers
[*]Terror Eel
[*]Entomancer
[/list]
[*]Added portrait for the following cards:
[list]
[*]Gang Up
[*]Seeker Strike
[*]Spinner
[*]Volley
[*]Knockdown
[*]Lift
[/list]
[*]Updated asset for [b]Kifuda[/b] relic
[*]Added asset for No Energy Gain power
[*]Added animation for [b]Ovicopter[/b] buff
[*]Added placeholder sketches for the following relics:
[list]
[*]Neow's Talisman
[*]Hefty Tablet
[/list]
[/list]
[h3]USER INTERFACE & EXPERIENCE:[/h3]
[list]
[*]Added Phobia Mode tickbox in the Settings
[*]You can now skip relics received at treasure chests
[*]Added disclaimers for Daily and Custom runs that you cannot unlock Epochs and Achievements with them anymore
[*]Added icon in top bar if player is unable to obtain epochs, achievements in a run
[*]Hovering over the character icon now explains if you cant get achievements or epochs
[*]Added a way to disable map drawings in multiplayer
[*]The invite button now uses a hotkey on controller instead of manual navigation
[/list]

[h3]WRITING:[/h3]
[list]
[*][b]Huddle Up[/b] card now says "ALL players" instead of "ALL allies"
[*]Improved wording clarity for [b]Bombardment[/b] and [b]Howl from Beyond[/b] cards
[*]The descriptions for [b]Fairy in a Bottle[/b] potion and [b]Lizard Tail[/b] relic now specify that they trigger specifically when you reach 0 HP, rather than when you die in any manner
[*][b]The Insatiable[/b] boss's Sandpit power is now worded more clearly on the turn that it will eat you
[/list]

[h3]LOCALIZATION:[/h3]
[list]
[*]Updated translations for various languages
[*]Updated Korean text spacing to be a little bit closer
[*]The "Fight" message in multiplayer treasure room is now translatable
[/list]

[h3]BUG FIXES:[/h3]

[b]General:[/b]
[list]
[*]Fixed rare Fatal Error when syncing Steam cloud saves
[*]Fixed rare bug where save could be reset
[*]Fixed exploit where players could controller navigate to card grid when the upgrade/remove/enchant/transform preview screen is open
[*]Fixed a crash that could occur when triggering the thin slice visual effect
[*]Fixed crashes related to screen transitions, logo animation, and creature deaths
[*]Fixed an issue when viewing the text of a card or power which has numerical values (damage, block, etc.) that have grown very large
[*]Fixed an issue where, if you saved and quit after winning a combat that rewards a predetermined relic, the relic reward would be randomized when continuing the run later
[*]Fixed an issue where, when a player would view their deck with "View Upgrades" enabled, changing the sort order would cause the screen to break
[*]Fixed softlock when card selection screen would show 0 options
[*]Fixed an issue with Call of the Void card's hovertips when playing in Castilian Spanish
[/list]
[b]Regent[/b]
[list]
[*]The Regent's character select screen now properly displays all constellations among the stars in the background
[/list]
[b]Defect:[/b]
[list]
[*]Fixed softlock when trying to transform [b]Rip and Tear[/b] card
[/list]
[b]Ancients:[/b]
[list]
[*]Fixed card prompts auto-selecting without player input after a run with [b]Vakuu's Whispering Earring[/b] relic
[*]Fixed softlock when [b]Vakuu's Whispering Earring[/b] relic would auto-play [b]Hand Trick[/b] card with 2+ eligible Skills
[/list]
[b]Events:[/b]
[list]
[*]Fixed missing Eternal hovertip when showing card preview for [b]Greed[/b] curse in [b]Sunken Treasury[/b] event
[/list]
[b]Multiplayer:[/b]
[list]
[*]Fixed a crash that could occur when rapidly retrying multiplayer joins
[*]Fixed a multiplayer sync issue that occurred when players used different OS languages
[*]Fixed a softlock that could occur when a player would die to [b]Breakthrough[/b] card's self-HP loss in multiplayer
[*]Fixed softlock at the end of the Architect event in multiplayer
[*]A proper error is now displayed when trying to accept a stale invite
[*]Fixed state divergence related to [b]Imbued[/b] enchantment and [b]Letter Opener[/b] relic
[*]Fixed state divergence related to [b]Defect[/b] orb passives triggering during a player choice
[*]Fixed a multiplayer softlock caused by auto-playing a sequence of multiple cards (via [b]Cascade[/b] card or another similar effect) and dying before the last card in the sequence has been played
[/list]
